Class UserSetting

java.lang.Object
Auth.UserSetting
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class UserSetting extends Object implements Serializable
Stores notification and display settings for a user account.

Each flag controls whether a particular type of alert or reminder is enabled. The appearance field controls the UI theme. Implements Serializable to allow persistence via DataManager.

See Also:
